message.content: write me down tmux keyboard combinations how to crete pates,m tabs, rename them, jump within the panes

content.thinking: The user wants a quick reference for tmux keyboard shortcuts for panes, tabs (windows), renaming, and navigation.

content.text:
## Tmux Key Reference

Default prefix: `Ctrl+b`

---

### Windows (Tabs)

| Action | Keys |
|--------|------|
| New window | `prefix + c` |
| Rename window | `prefix + ,` |
| Next window | `prefix + n` |
| Previous window | `prefix + p` |
| Go to window N | `prefix + 0-9` |
| List windows | `prefix + w` |
| Close window | `prefix + &` |

---

### Panes

| Action | Keys |
|--------|------|
| Split horizontal (top/bottom) | `prefix + "` |
| Split vertical (left/right) | `prefix + %` |
| Close pane | `prefix + x` |
| Toggle zoom pane | `prefix + z` |
| Show pane numbers | `prefix + q` |
| Go to pane N | `prefix + q` then `0-9` |

---

### Pane Navigation

| Action | Keys |
|--------|------|
| Move to pane (arrow) | `prefix + ←↑↓→` |
| Cycle through panes | `prefix + o` |
| Last active pane | `prefix + ;` |
| Swap pane forward | `prefix + }` |
| Swap pane backward | `prefix + {` |

---

### Pane Resize

| Action | Keys |
|--------|------|
| Resize (hold prefix + arrow) | `prefix + Ctrl+←↑↓→` |
| Resize in steps | `prefix + Alt+←↑↓→` |
